RecursionLimitExceededError: recursion limit (16) exceeded while inlining @zk_chip `rfibo`. Each recursive call into a chip is unrolled at compile time; if your chip recurses with multiple call sites per level (e.g. fibo(n-1) + fibo(n-2)), the unrolled depth grows exponentially. Either reduce the recursion in the chip body or raise ZinniaConfig.recursion_limit (current default is intentionally small).
